headerDisplay: Dreame Vacuum — Matter-native plugin for Homebridge v2. Uses Dreame Cloud + MQTT for real-time state.

username.title: Dreame Account Email
username.description: Your Dreame / Dreamehome app email. Can also be set via DREAME_EMAIL env var.

password.title: Dreame Account Password
password.description: Your Dreame / Dreamehome app password. Can also be set via DREAME_PASSWORD env var.

country.title: Country / Region
country.description: Dreame Cloud region — must match your Dreamehome app region.

automationContactSensors.title: Expose Automation Contact Sensors
automationContactSensors.description: Expose optional HomeKit contact sensors for automations: Idle, Busy, Cleaning, and Error. Disabled by default; disabling later removes these sensors.

mapOverrides.title: Map and Room Name Overrides
mapOverrides.description: Optionally rename discovered Dreame floors/maps and their rooms. Map and segment IDs are shown in the startup log.

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: Optional. Restrict this override to one Dreame robot.

name.title: Floor / Map Name
name.description: Optional name exposed for this floor/map.

name.title: Room Name
name.description: Name exposed through Matter and Apple Home.
